description: Marcus Johnson — chronic care office visit. MDM/Time trap: note documents 25min face-to-face (maps to 99213 by time) but MODERATE MDM (maps to 99214). Agent must select 99214. G2211 add-on required for ongoing management of chronic conditions.

key_challenges: MDM vs time-based E/M selection — 25min maps to 99213 by time but MODERATE MDM maps to 99214; higher level governs
G2211 add-on — requires recognizing explicit chronic condition ongoing management language in note
